summary: Scan Breakdown now includes Apple Intelligence cleanup actions, and Memory Analyzer groups recurring alerts into Issue History with smarter notification timing.
introduced: Issue History — new System Optimization tab lists recurring memory issues with occurrence counts, average/median intervals, alerts sent, and suppressed repeats
Issue History AI analysis — summarizes patterns and suggests habits to reduce repeat memory pressure alerts
Breakdown cleanup plan — after fast or deep scans, Apple Intelligence cleanup suggestions and Take Action cards appear on the Breakdown tab by bucket (Safe to Clean, Review First, Personal)
changed: Memory Analyzer notifications — similar issues share one stable key; repeats are recorded but only notify again after about 4 hours, with a 20-minute global cooldown between any alerts
Scan complete banner — points to View Breakdown & Cleanup instead of breakdown-only wording
Check for Update — toolbar button shows icon plus Check for Update label in the top-right update control
